description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden table with a robust and rustic appearance, featuring a thick tabletop and four sturdy, tapered legs. The wood grain is visible across the entire surface, giving it a natural and slightly weathered look. The legs are set at the corners and have a slight outward taper, ending in square feet for stability. The table's finish is matte, with a medium to dark brown color that highlights the texture of the wood. There are no visible decorative carvings, inlays, or additional features such as drawers or hardware. Its solid construction suggests it is designed for communal or heavy-duty use, suitable for parks, outdoor patios, or urban gathering spaces.
description: A large, rectangular, rustic wooden table with a thick top and four sturdy, tapered legs. The surface is matte brown with visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the short end, showing the thickness of the tabletop and two front legs.
description_view_1: A wide view from the long side, displaying the full tabletop and all four legs, emphasizing its rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the opposite short end with the same leg and tabletop features.
description_view_3: Another long-side view, nearly identical to view 1, showing the full tabletop and all four legs.
